banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock founder: Bram Hendriks, a Dutch resident incorporating a brand-new single-founder BV, 'Hendriks Consultancy B.V.', a management-consultancy business seated and established in Rotterdam, selling wholesale services only (no retail). Bram is the BV's sole shareholder and sole managing director, with sole (alleen bevoegd) signing authority, paying up the minimum EUR 0.01 nominal capital permitted under the Flex-BV regime. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

collectedValues.label: Are you registering a new BV, or continuing an existing business or establishment as a BV?
Name of the BV as stated in the articles of association
Registered seat (statutaire zetel) of the BV
Date of the deed of incorporation (akte van oprichting)
Issued capital (geplaatst kapitaal) of the BV
Paid-up capital (gestort kapitaal) of the BV
Does the BV have more than one trade name?
Activities of the BV
collectedValues.value: Adviesverlening op het gebied van bedrijfsvoering en management aan andere ondernemingen

collectedValues.label: Does the BV sell products to consumers (retail)?
Does the BV sell products to other businesses or legal entities (wholesale)?
Does the BV import products from abroad?
Does the BV export products abroad?
Is the postal address different from the visiting address?
Number of people who work 15 hours or more per week
Number of people who work less than 15 hours per week
May sellers use the BV's visiting and postal address for marketing (unsolicited advertising)?
Does the BV sometimes hire out employees to other businesses or legal entities for payment?
Does the managing director live outside the Netherlands?
Is the managing director also the sole shareholder (enig aandeelhouder)?
Managing director's authority (bevoegdheid) under the articles of association
Does the managing director hold a title (e.g. director, president)?

conformanceCheck.method: Programmatic re-derivation of every field's effective visibility/requiredness from the schema's own visibleWhen/requiredWhen/required members (a GSP-0013 condition evaluator), cross-checked against collectedValues + notApplicableFields for exact 1:1 coverage of all 61 fields in schema.fields.
